general.title: Title
general.hostIpTip: Used to allow your server's IP in badge URLs and SSRF protection.
general.loggingTip: Errors shows warnings and errors only. Security events are always logged.
general.socketTip: Use the URL of a socket proxy container for least-privilege access. No proxy? You can enter unix:///var/run/docker.sock directly. Only do this on a private, trusted network you fully control.
general.passwordTip: Leave blank to keep existing password. Min 8 characters. For stronger protection, consider placing the dashboard behind a dedicated authentication proxy. This built-in password is a lightweight gate, not a full authentication layer.

appearance.collectionTip: Leave Collection ID blank for random.
